zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Millington於1460年出生在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾時，他的父親William Millington30歲，母親Mrs. William Millington25歲。他於1487年與Agnes Sotheron在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年7月13日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Millington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Cheshire and East Yorkshire. The Cheshire placename derives from Old English mylen ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Yorkshire placename probably derives from an Old English personal name Milla + Old English connective -ing- + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Millington was born in 1460, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Millington, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. William Millington, was 25. He married Agnes Sotheron in 1487, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 13 July 1508, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes Sotheron en 1487, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 13 juillet 1508, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Holme Upon Spalding Moor, East Yorkshire: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Millington(이)가 1460년 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Millington(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Millington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 Agnes Sotheron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 7월 13일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Millington nasceu em 1460, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Millington, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Millington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Sotheron em 1487, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 13 de julho de 1508, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Millington родился в 1460 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Millington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Millington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Sotheron в 1487 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 13 июля 1508 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
